title: circaea alpina var. intermedia
intro: Circaea alpina var. intermedia, commonly known as the Alpine Enchanter's Nightshade or Intermediate Enchanter's Nightshade, is a plant species within the Circaea genus, characterized by its unique flowering pattern and medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Circaea alpina var. intermedia include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and potentially aid in the treatment of certain skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
